division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text:
(a) The department may charge a service fee of not more than fifteen dollars ($15), in addition to other fees payable under this code, for the expedited completion of any of the following services within 72 hours after receipt of a complete and proper application for the service:

(1) Initial registration of a vehicle.

(2) Transfer of registration of a vehicle.

(3) Issuance of a duplicate certificate of ownership.

(b) The services in subdivision (a) shall be available only at the department’s headquarters office in Sacramento.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 6. Registration and Weight Fees [9101 - 9808]
#### Article 2. Registration Fees [9250 - 9271]
##### § 9270

(a) The department may charge a service fee of not more than fifteen dollars ($15), in addition to other fees payable under this code, for the expedited completion of any of the following services within 72 hours after receipt of a complete and proper application for the service:

    (1) Initial registration of a vehicle.

    (2) Transfer of registration of a vehicle.

    (3) Issuance of a duplicate certificate of ownership.

(b) The services in subdivision (a) shall be available only at the department’s headquarters office in Sacramento.

*(Amended by Stats. 2004, Ch. 430, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2005.)*
